title: Leptochilus quercifolius

This plant is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It is an epiphytic fern, often found growing on trees. Its classification within the plant kingdom is as a vascular plant, specifically a type of cryptogam.

Its use in traditional medicine underscores the importance of continued research into this plant's medicinal properties.
